description: QuantCalendar + QuantDrive + QuantDocs + QuantMeet deep screen enhancement - add missing interactive features like drag-to-create events, event detail modal with RSVP/reminders/video links, file preview panel enhancements, document formatting toolbar with full controls, presence cursors, template gallery, meeting screen sharing with annotations, reactions, and hand raise
steps: QuantCalendar: Enhance apps/quantcalendar/src/components/MonthView.tsx, WeekView.tsx, DayView.tsx to support drag-to-create events (mousedown+mousemove+mouseup to select time ranges). Add onCreateEvent callback prop.

QuantCalendar: Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/EventDetailModal.tsx with RSVP buttons (Yes/No/Maybe), location display with map link, video call link button, reminder settings (5min/15min/30min/1hr), attendee list with status indicators, and color category selector.
QuantCalendar: Enhance apps/quantcalendar/src/components/CalendarSidebar.tsx to show upcoming events list below the MiniCalendar with time and color indicators.
QuantCalendar: Create apps/quantcalendar/src/components/SchedulingAssistant.tsx - find available times across participants, show time slots grid with availability indicators.
QuantDrive: Enhance apps/quantdrive/src/components/UploadArea.tsx to show individual file progress bars with filename, percentage, cancel button. Add multi-file upload support.
QuantDrive: Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/FileContextMenu.tsx with actions: Open, Download, Rename, Move, Copy, Star, Share, Trash. Use right-click context menu pattern.
QuantDrive: Enhance apps/quantdrive/src/components/FilePreview.tsx to show inline image previews, PDF viewer placeholder, doc preview with formatted content, video player placeholder.
QuantDrive: Create apps/quantdrive/src/components/ActivityPanel.tsx showing recent file activity (who edited what, when) with timeline format.

QuantDocs: Enhance apps/quantdocs/src/components/DocToolbar.tsx to include full formatting controls: headings dropdown (H1-H6), bold/italic/underline/strikethrough buttons, ordered/unordered list, blockquote, code block, link insertion, image upload, table insertion, text color, highlight color.
QuantDocs: Enhance apps/quantdocs/src/components/PresenceBar.tsx to show colored cursor indicators with user names, animated presence dots, and 'N others viewing' badge.
QuantDocs: Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/TemplateGallery.tsx with template cards (Blank, Meeting Notes, Project Brief, Report, Resume, Letter) each with preview thumbnail and description.
QuantDocs: Enhance apps/quantdocs/src/components/VersionHistory.tsx to show diff view with added/removed lines highlighted, restore button, and timeline of changes.
QuantMeet: Enhance apps/quantmeet/src/components/ControlBar.tsx to add hand raise button, reactions menu (thumbs up, clap, heart, laugh, surprised), breakout rooms button, whiteboard button.
QuantMeet: Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ScreenShareOverlay.tsx with annotation toolbar (pen, highlighter, text, arrow, shapes) and presenter controls (pause share, stop share).
QuantMeet: Create apps/quantmeet/src/components/ReactionsOverlay.tsx showing floating animated reactions that appear and fade out (emoji bubbles rising animation).
QuantMeet: Enhance apps/quantmeet/src/components/PreJoinLobby.tsx to show camera preview with virtual background selector, audio level indicator, device settings (camera/mic/speaker dropdowns).

Update apps/quantcalendar/src/app/page.tsx to wire EventDetailModal and SchedulingAssistant. Update apps/quantdocs/src/app/page.tsx to add TemplateGallery. Update apps/quantmeet meeting page to wire new overlays.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes for quantcalendar, quantdrive, quantdocs, quantmeet
pnpm test passes for all affected apps
All new components export properly and are wired into page layouts
EventDetailModal renders with RSVP, reminders, attendees, location, video link
DocToolbar has full formatting controls with proper aria labels
ControlBar has reactions and hand raise buttons
findings: All typecheck, test, and lint pass. QuantDrive does not have @quant/brand in its dependencies, so spring configs were inlined. Modal uses isOpen prop (not open). Prettier reformatted on commit via lint-staged.
